# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: third-party-apis
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.thirdparty.com
  addresses:
    - 192.0.2.1
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS
  endpoints:
    - address: api.thirdparty.com

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-databases
spec:
  hosts:
    - db.external.com
  addresses:
    - 203.0.113.1
  ports:
    - number: 5432
      name: postgres
      protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  endpoints:
    - address: db.external.com

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: third-party-apis-routing
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.thirdparty.com
  http:
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: "/v1/"
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api.thirdparty.com
            port:
              number: 443

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-databases-routing
spec:
  hosts:
    - db.external.com
  tcp:
    - match:
        - port: 5432
      route:
        - destination:
            host: db.external.com
            port:
              number: 5432
